# New Content Ideas - Generated by Max

Based on: Evan, Highland Private Office, Trending Topics

## 1. "I Hired AI Before Employees" (AI/Business)
**Hook:** I hired AI agents before I hired my first employee. Here's what happened.
**Angle:** Modern hiring - AI first, humans second. The new staffing model.
**Platform:** Blog + X thread + LinkedIn

## 2. "The CEO's New Best Friend" (AI/Business)
**Hook:** Your AI doesn't sleep. Doesn't complain. Doesn't quit. But can it replace your team?
**Angle:** AI as executive assistant, not replacement. Productivity play.
**Platform:** Blog + X thread

## 3. "Winter Park to the World" (Local/Business)
**Hook:** Built a business in Winter Park, Florida serving clients everywhere.
**Angle:** Remote business, local roots. Florida business advantages.
**Platform:** Blog + LinkedIn

## 4. "The $10M Question" (Wealth/Business)
**Hook:** At what point do you stop working IN your business and start working ON it?
**Angle:** The entrepreneur's crossroads. Build vs. exit decision.
**Platform:** Blog + X thread

## 5. "AI Didn't Replace My Job - It Upgraded It" (AI/Personal)
**Hook:** I was scared AI would make me obsolete. Instead, it made me 10x better.
**Angle:** Personal story. Human + AI partnership.
**Platform:** Blog (Evan Personal) + X thread

## 6. "The 3-Hour Workday" (Productivity/AI)
**Hook:** With AI handling the grunt work, I only work 3 hours a day. Here's my schedule.
**Angle:** Deep work + AI automation. Practical tips.
**Platform:** Blog + X thread + LinkedIn

## 7. "Why Your Business Is Worth Less Than You Think" (Business/Valuation)
**Hook:** Most business owners overestimate their company's value. Here's how to actually increase it.
**Angle:** Valuation levers, AI implementation, exit planning.
**Platform:** Blog + LinkedIn

## 8. "The New Wealth Advisors" (Industry/AI)
**Hook:** AI is coming for financial advisors. Here's who's surviving.
**Angle:** Fintech disruption, human advisor value, AI augmentation.
**Platform:** Blog + LinkedIn

## 9. "My AI Crew: Who Does What" (AI/Personal)
**Hook:** I have 3 AI agents. Tazer does research, Crabby builds dashboards, Max creates content. Meet the team.
**Angle:** Personal, introduce the agents. Fun, engaging.
**Platform:** Blog (Evan Personal) + X thread

## 10. "Florida Is the New California" (Local/Investment)
**Hook:** Tech founders are fleeing California for Florida. Here's why.
**Angle:** Tax advantages, business friendly, quality of life.
**Platform:** Blog + LinkedIn
